title: 封面
prompt:
# Codex PPT Slide Image Prompt

## Canvas
{
  "type": "16:9 full-slide PowerPoint image",
  "language": "Chinese",
  "slide_number": 1,
  "render_slide_number": false
}

## Deck Goal
重新設計麗山高中行政與專題國際化行动研究報告，為其製作最完整的45頁教學解說簡報

## Required Background
{
  "deck_context": {
    "source_summary": "麗山高中行動研究報告，闡述如何透過行政領航五力模型，推動「競賽、交流、參訪」三合一的國際教育旅行，解決科學特色高中專題研究難以走向國際的困境，使國際發表普惠化。",
    "core_claim": "行政創新是驅動教學與課程接軌國際的核心引擎，主動出國的藍海策略能落實機會平權並深化校本課程。",
    "canonical_terms": [
      "科學移動力",
      "行政領航五力模型",
      "三合一創新模式",
      "麗山智匯",
      "ESP學術英語",
      "減法哲學",
      "都市生存演練"
    ]
  }
}

## Global Style
{
  "name": "科技領航專業風",
  "visual_direction": "clean modern professional deck, calm technical presentation, structured evidence-driven layout, readable pragmatic visual system, light background with crisp hierarchy",
  "color_palette": "deep professional blue (#1E3A8A) as primary, bright orange/gold (#F97316) as accent, slate gray (#475569) for body text, light gray (#F8FAFC) background",
  "typography": "large bold Chinese headings in clean sans-serif font, compact clear body text"
}

## Input Images

- Image 1: /Users/froglssh/Downloads/lssh_intl_edu_ppt/assets/page_1_img_1.jpeg — 封面主視覺展示麗山高中標誌與意象; preserve image aspect ratio and layout


## Slide
{
  "number": 1,
  "title": "封面",
  "role": "cover",
  "intent": "開啟報告，展示報告名稱、作者與榮譽"
}

## Text
{
  "title": "封面",
  "key_points": [
    "行政領航驅動校本專題國際化：",
    "「競賽、交流、參訪」三合一創新模式的國際教育旅行",
    "臺北市第 27 屆教育專業創新與行動研究",
    "報告人與作者團隊：林獻升、郭瓊華、楊雅茹、林桔楷、簡君玲、陳汶靖"
  ],
  "speaker_focus": null
}

## Input Image Handling Rules
For any input image marked as a strict input asset, include it visibly and preserve its content. Do not redraw, replace, relabel, or invent a similar figure. Scale and crop only as needed for composition while keeping the important labels, arrows, data, and relationships recognizable.

## Universal Constraints
- The final image itself must contain the title and key points.
- Render Chinese text exactly and legibly; avoid garbled characters.
- Keep the confirmed deck style consistent while varying layout by slide role.
- No watermark, unrelated logo, or extra slide number.

input_images.role: 封面主視覺展示麗山高中標誌與意象
input_images.fidelity: preserve image aspect ratio and layout
